# filter-repo commit map — 2026-07 history rewrite
#
# The 2026-07 secret scrub (git filter-repo: removed the tracked workspace/
# run archive, relativized absolute author paths) REWROTE EVERY COMMIT HASH.
# Any hash cited in a document written before that date is dead.
#
# Format: <old-hash> <new-hash>   (all-zero new-hash = commit dropped)
# Tags survived the rewrite and are the durable anchors:
#   echobot-v1          -> 957be3f49e9eba18022a546bef7e0d50de6e0fda
#   echobot-v2          -> 15edd7c910996210266f307b73585c6312ce42e4
#   lifecycle-baseline-1 -> (2026-07-15, post-rewrite; unaffected)
#
# Look up an old hash:  grep ^<old> docs/history/commit-map.txt
#
